requirements.summary: Update logo text in SiteHeader and SiteFooter to display in solid blue color
acceptanceCriteria: The logo text in the site header is rendered in a full/solid blue color
The logo text in the site footer (if present) matches the same full blue color
No other header or footer elements change color
The blue color is consistent with the existing blue palette defined in the Tailwind config / CSS tokens

file_operations.description: Update the logo text styling to use a solid blue color from the existing Tailwind blue palette (e.g., text-blue-600 or the primary blue token defined in index.css). Remove any gradient or multi-color styling currently applied to the logo text.
Update the logo text styling to match the same solid blue color applied in SiteHeader. Ensure consistency with the blue palette token used in the header.
